exists(k0: Domain) { attains_maximum_at[Domain, Value](domain, replacement, k0) }
let w0: Domain satisfy { attains_maximum_at[Domain, Value](domain, replacement, w0) }
function[T0, T1: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { exists(k0: T0) { attains_maximum_at[T0, T1](x0, x1, k0) } = attains_maximum_on[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[Domain, Value](domain, replacement)
not exists(k0: Domain) { attains_maximum_at[Domain, Value](domain, replacement, k0) } or attains_maximum_on[Domain, Value](domain, replacement)

goal: exists(k0: Domain) { attains_minimum_at[Domain, Value](domain, original, k0) }

p.c: function[T0, T1: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { exists(k0: T0) { attains_minimum_at[T0, T1](x0, x1, k0) } = attains_minimum_on[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[Domain, Value](domain, original)
not exists(k0: Domain) { attains_minimum_at[Domain, Value](domain, original, k0) } or attains_minimum_on[Domain, Value](domain, original)

p.c: function(x0: Domain) { not attains_minimum_at[Domain, Value](domain, replacement, x0) }(point)
exists(k0: Domain) { attains_minimum_at[Domain, Value](domain, replacement, k0) }
let w0: Domain satisfy { attains_minimum_at[Domain, Value](domain, replacement, w0) }
function[T0, T1: PartialOrder](x0: Set[T0], x1: T0 -> T1) { exists(k0: T0) { attains_minimum_at[T0, T1](x0, x1, k0) } = attains_minimum_on[T0, T1](x0, x1) }[Domain, Value](domain, replacement)
not exists(k0: Domain) { attains_minimum_at[Domain, Value](domain, replacement, k0) } or attains_minimum_on[Domain, Value](domain, replacement)
